description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem with elaborate detailing, suspended from a decorative ceiling mount. Eight gracefully curved arms radiate outward, each supporting a lampshade with a slightly flared, translucent appearance. The arms and central body are adorned with intricate scrollwork and classical motifs, giving the fixture a luxurious and elegant look. The shades are evenly spaced, creating a balanced and symmetrical silhouette. The overall finish appears to be a glossy, light-colored material, possibly glass or crystal, with metallic accents. This sconce is designed to be a statement piece, suitable for upscale urban interiors or grand public spaces.
description: An elegant, multi-arm ceiling sconce with eight lampshades, ornate scrollwork, and a glossy, light finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of eight arms and shades, with the central stem and ceiling mount clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the curvature of the arms and the depth of the central body, with all shades still visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to the previous, highlighting the even spacing of the arms and the decorative details on the stem.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, emphasizing the symmetry and the uniform design of the arms and shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture exhibits a vintage, classical design with ornate scrollwork and a luxurious, elegant silhouette. Its symmetrical arms and decorative motifs evoke a sense of grandeur and sophistication.
